intro.title: codebase-memory-mcp
intro.desc: The fastest and most efficient code intelligence engine for AI coding agents.** Full-indexes an average repository in milliseconds, the Linux kernel (28M LOC, 75K files) in 3 minutes. Answers structural queries in under 1ms. Ships as a single static binary for macOS, Linux, and Windows — download, run `install`, done.

detalle.avoid_if: ya tienes una herramienta equivalente o no encaja con tu stack actual
